name: com.taotie.render-pipelines
description: Custom Unity Scriptable Render Pipeline built on the Render Graph API. Supports Forward and Deferred rendering paths with Forward+ tile-based light culling (up to 4 directional + 256 point/spot lights), cascaded shadow maps (1-4 cascades, shadowmask, 3 quality levels), and a full post-processing stack (Bloom, Tone Mapping, Color Grading LUT, FXAA, Bicubic Rescaling). Includes PBR Lit/Unlit/Particle/UI shaders with GPU instancing, SRP Batcher, LOD cross-fade, per-camera HDR and render scaling, automatic shader variant stripping, and WebGL/mobile compatibility.

samples.description: Example scripts and scenes showcasing GPU instancing, per-object material properties, baked lighting, circuitry materials, LOD, many lights, multiple cameras, particles, and tone mapping.
